    Properties

    Name Description
    JointsCount

    Gets the number of joints
    Skeleton

    Gets or sets the Skeleton Node, which represents the root of a joints hierarchy.
    VisualParents

    Gets a collection of Node instances using this Skin.

    Name Description
    BindJoints(params Node[])
    BindJoints(Matrix4x4, params Node[])

    Binds a bone armature of Node to the associated skinned mesh.

    Binds a bone armature of Node to the associated skinned mesh.
